nasb.text: You make us a reproach to our neighbors, A scoffing and a derision to those around us.

esv.text: You have made us the taunt of our neighbors, the derision and scorn of those around us.

cnv.text: 你使我們成為鄰居的羞辱， 成為我們四周的人譏笑和諷刺的對象。

ccb.text: 你使我们遭四邻辱骂， 被周围人讥讽、嘲笑。

csbs.text: 你使我们成为邻居辱骂的对象， 成为周围人嘲笑和讽刺的对象。
